subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou art He Who, through the loftiness of Thy sovereignty, the sublimity of Thy proof, the greatness of Thy might, and the intensity of Thy power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انت الذی بعلو سلطانک و سمو برهانک و عظیم قدرتک و شدید قوتک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for protection
